ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emergency_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency response */,
  "emergency_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency (e.g., police, fire, medical) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the emergency response */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the emergency location */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Municipal ward where the emergency occurred */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the emergency occurred */,
  "community" TEXT /* Community area where the emergency occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the emergency location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the emergency location */,
  "towing_zone" INTEGER /* Towing zone for the emergency location */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the emergency */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "dispatcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dispatcher who handled the call */,
  "responder_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the responder team that responded to the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the response (e.g., en route, on scene, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the incident */,
  "injured_count" INTEGER /* Number of injured individuals */,
  "property_damage" REAL /* Estimated property damage in monetary terms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_community FOREIGN KEY ("community") REFERENCES geographic_information ("community"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES geographic_information ("neighborhood"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_responses_ward FOREIGN KEY ("ward") REFERENCES geographic_information ("ward")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_information" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "ward" INTEGER /* Municipal ward */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood */,
  "community" TEXT /* Community area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood or community */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood or community in square kilometers */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information (e.g., age distribution, income levels) */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for local authorities or community leaders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each emergency response
Type of emergency (e.g., police, fire, medical)
Date of the emergency response
Address of the emergency location
Municipal ward where the emergency occurred
Neighborhood where the emergency occurred
Community area where the emergency occurred
Latitude coordinate of the emergency location

Current status of the response (e.g., en route, on scene, completed)
Additional notes or comments about the response
Number of victims involved in the incident
Number of injured individuals
